books.title: Full Stack Web Development
books.author: Brad Traversy
books.description:
Covers front-end and back-end web development concepts.
Includes HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks.
Focuses on real-world full stack applications.
Ideal for beginners and aspiring full stack developers.

books.title: Data Science with Python
books.author: Jake VanderPlas
books.description:
Explains data analysis using Python libraries.
Covers NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib in detail.
Focuses on practical data science workflows.
Suitable for beginners and intermediate learners.

books.title: Machine Learning Basics
books.author: Andrew Ng
books.description:
Introduces core machine learning concepts clearly.
Covers supervised and unsupervised learning.
Focuses on algorithms and real-world use cases.
Perfect for students starting AI and ML.

books.title: MERN Stack Development
books.author: Maximilian Schwarzmüller
books.description:
Teaches MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js.
Builds full-stack applications step by step.
Covers authentication and REST APIs.
Ideal for modern JavaScript developers.

books.title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
books.author: Thomas Erl
books.description:
Explains cloud computing concepts and models.
Covers IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS architectures.
Focuses on scalability and virtualization.
Suitable for beginners in cloud technology.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description:
Teaches principles of writing clean code.
Focuses on readability and maintainability.
Includes real-world coding examples.
Essential for professional software developers.

books.title: You Don’t Know JS Yet
books.author: Kyle Simpson
books.description:
Deep dive into JavaScript core concepts.
Explains scope, closures, and async behavior.
Helps developers truly understand JS.
Best for intermediate JavaScript learners.

books.title: Design Patterns
books.author: Erich Gamma
books.description:
Covers classic software design patterns.
Explains reusable solutions to common problems.
Focuses on object-oriented design principles.
Ideal for advanced developers and architects.

books.title: Deep Learning
books.author: Ian Goodfellow
books.description:
Comprehensive guide to deep learning concepts.
Covers neural networks and deep architectures.
Includes math and practical implementations.
Best for advanced AI and ML learners.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt
books.description:
Focuses on practical programming practices.
Teaches problem-solving and coding discipline.
Covers career growth and mindset.
A must-read for all programmers.
